case_title: LO, YANNY TANG VS CHAU, KING VAN DBA POWER AUTO COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: PLFT IS TO FILE A DISMISSAL AS TO DMV AFTER PLFT RECEIVES PAYMENT UNDER THE BOND.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24522, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LO, YANNY TANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAU, KING VAN DBA POWER AUTO COMPANY DEPT.OF MOTOR VEHICLE TRUSTEE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, FROM CASH BOND #0299401086. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24522 ON 6/13/96. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
DMV IS ORDERED TO RELEASE AND PAY TO PLFT $5000.0O OF THE CASH BOND HELD ON BOND #0299401086 RELATING TO JUDGMT IN SF. SMALL CLAIMS #751905 (LOW V CHAW)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DEFT.RETURNED UNABLE TO LOCATE.
LETTER FROM DMV RCVD,RE:PROPER ADRESS FOR SERVICE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LO, YANNY TANG AS TO DEFENDANT CHAU, KING VAN DBA POWER AUTO COMPANY DEPT.OF MOTOR VEHICLE TRUSTEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LO, YANNY TANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHAU, KING VAN DBA POWER AUTO COMPANY DEPT.OF MOTOR VEHICLE TRUSTEE ORDERS: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CHAW, KING DBA POWER AUTO CO. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
